title: Simulation Helper Skill for Eclipse SUMO
description: A reusable Codex/Claude skill package and checklist for auditing SUMO/TraCI traffic-signal control experiments before results are reported. The package focuses on experiment planning, route and configuration consistency, TLS/NEMA checks, TraCI controller boundaries, paired controller comparison, output auditing, completion-aware metrics, reproducibility risks, debugging paths, and evidence-bounded claim wording.
